feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: In Color
entry.summary:
Author: aeternus_diamant

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,165Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 78

Summary: Everyone is born with a mark on their skin — a symbol unique to the bond between two souls. They bloom in color the moment you come into the world, vivid as stained glass, as alive as a heartbeat.When your soulmate is near, the mark warms.When they find you, it blazes.When they die, it fades.Evan Buckley has carried a gray mark since birth. He has never known it to be anything else.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: I Will Cross Universes for You
entry.summary:
Author: NyotaGirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,865Chapters: 3/10Kudos: 16

Summary: "He wasn't me. How..." Buck's voice cracks, and the sound cuts through Eddie like a knife. "...how could you not see that?" And the tears finally fall, and all Eddie wants is to wrap him in his arms and hold him until they melt into one, until he can ease some of Buck's pain. Pain that he caused. He can only hang how head in shame, ignoring the way his own heart breaks because he should have known better. He should have... OR Buck has an evil doppelganger OR In which Buck's evil 'twin' kidnaps Buck and takes his place and Eddie and the rest of the 118 are none the wiser. In their defense, how could they have known that alternate universes existed?

entry.title: The Quote Unquote Lovers
entry.summary:
Author: kayas48off

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,784Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 2

Summary: “Forgive me father, for I have sinned,” he spoke confidently. He might not have much to be confident about right now, but one thing he knew for certain was that he had sinned. “It has been…probably since middle school, since I last confessed.” At the time, it seemed like the best idea to stop going to church when he started high school. He veiled it in his age and maturity when his parents asked for a reason. He pushed his hands, that trembled at the thought of confessions, since one sunny evening in middle school, into his pockets. Now confessing to losing his son, he wondered about that sunny evening. If he confessed truthfully, would his hands stop trembling? Would Christopher still be here? Would the silence be filled with nightingales?   OR: Eddie and Buck navigate their increasingly complicated feelings, emphasized by the tension of Chris and, subsequently, Eddie leaving for El Paso, Texas. However, 5 times their most crucial interactions are unknowingly borrowed from other queer couples, and 1 time they are the queer couple. (tags will be updated with new chapters)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I have what illnesses?
entry.summary:
Author: Rebekkajade97

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 89,847Chapters: 25/25Kudos: 111

Summary: Buck thought talking to Dr. Copeland would help him during the pandemic never did he think he'd get diagnosed with actual illnesses. How does he cope with the aftermath?

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,679Chapters: 8/24Kudos: 285

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1.

entry.title: Sweet, sweet dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Nightskydeer

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,053Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 83

Summary: Buck has had some revelations about his life while Eddie is in Texas. Mainly? He's in love with his best friend, he wants to be his husband and the father of his child, and... he's the stereotypical queer friend who falls in love with a straight guy. How awkward. When Chris calls one day to tell him that Eddie disappeared while working as an Uber driver, he immediately flies to Texas to stay with him and, hopefully, help figure out what happened to his best friend.   Sam and Dean head to El Paso, Texas, to investigate a case linked to a series of disappearances they believe may be connected to the supernatural world. There, they meet Evan Buckley, a desperate firefighter from LA who just wants to find his partner.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: You are my home
entry.summary:
Author: Enti13666

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,807Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 510

Summary: When Christopher calls his grandparents after seeing his father with a copy of his mother, he was hoping for a few weeks of peace in El Paso. What he didn't expect was for his grandparents to sue his father for custody. When his father clearly doesn't want him and doesn't show up in court, Chris does the only thing he can. He calls his Buck. Buck has never let him down before.

entry.title: a clover clearing
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,413Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 51

Summary: Eddie's no stranger to trespassers on his territory, so when he smells another 'were on the wind, he goes to check it out.He isn't expecting a werebunny to be sniffing around his favorite clearing to nap in, in the throes of heat, having followed Eddie's scent here blindly.Eddie also isn't expecting for the 'bunny to offer up letting Eddie get a taste of him, so Eddie doesn't eat him. Eddie had no such plans, but he's not letting such an opportunity to pass.-dont like dont read and scroll

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Til Hungover Do Us Part
entry.summary:
Author: justkayla_11

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,327Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 103

Summary: Then Buck tilts his head, studying him with a crooked, drunk smile."Y'know... that speech kinda sounds like you're describing me." Eddie blinks at him. Actually thinks about it—slow, alcohol-fogged gears turning. "...Huh," he says. Another beat. Then, with a sudden, reckless grin: "Okay. Marry me." Or Buck and Eddie had too much fun in Nashville and accidentally got married. Both not remembering until Eddie gets an important email.

entry.title: On Purrpose
entry.summary:
Author: UnlostDrarry

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,155Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 440

Summary: “Are you sure I can’t get you anything? Some coffee maybe?” “Nah, it’s alright. Oreo was good company for my day off. Maybe I’ll see you around?” “Yeah, maybe. Thanks again.” Should Eddie say something to make him stay? He already refused coffee, but maybe he didn’t like coffee? Shit, he was reaching for the doorknob and Eddie had lost his chance. Eddie opened his mouth to say… something… and was interrupted by a feral screech that had the other man whipping around, just in time to catch a chest full of cat. “What the fuck?,” he asked, looking down at Oreo, wide-eyed.   Or… Eddie’s cat goes missing and Buck finds her. Oreo gets extremely attached to Buck and won’t let him leave until she’s confident that he’ll come back. Clearly, she has to do everything for her owner.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: slow burn
entry.summary:
Author: paleredheadinascifi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,828Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1,062

Summary: Hey, Buck?” Christopher says. “How do you know you’re not in love with my dad?”Buck freezes. A full body clench. “Uh,” he says. “Could you - - I think I - - sorry,” he laughs uncomfortably. “Could you repeat the question?”“I asked Dad, but now I’m more confused. And you date men, right? But you don’t date Dad. So how do you know you don’t want to date Dad?” Or, Christopher has some questions. He asks the two worst possible people.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 179,608Chapters: 37/?Kudos: 100

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.summary:

entry.title: Learning To Stay
entry.summary:
Author: FandomWork101

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,640Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 329

Summary: Buck knows the 118 is his family. They have been with him through so much. But when everyone goes home, it is Buck left by himself. Buck decides he wants to change that. He decides that he wants to create his own family. One that doesn’t leave. One that stays. So Buck adopts a dog. But that leads to some jealousy from the Diaz family as they feel this dog is taking all of Buck’s time.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: And If I Drown, What Then?
entry.summary:
Author: Allypop_84

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,090Chapters: 13/30Kudos: 676

Summary: Post-lawsuit, Buck fights to reclaim his place at the 118. But the team he came back for doesn’t quite feel like home anymore, and the distance between him and Eddie keeps widening. Buck feels himself slowly disappearing - first from the team, then from himself. He's always been good at saving other people. He's never been good at saving himself. Or A Buck and Eddie post-lawsuit fic. ----------- Please heed the tags! This fic explores alcohol and substance abuse and may be triggering for some readers. If these themes are difficult for you, please put yourself first.

entry.title: Can You Feel Me? Can You Show Me?
entry.summary:
Author: adorkable_buddie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,472Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 132

Summary: "There were–and are–very few things I am sure of in this life. But Christopher being safe with Buck is number one.”Maddie takes a deep breath. “Do you love him?”Eddie looks at her, incredulous. “Buck?”“Yes.”“Of course I do.”“Are you in love with him?” · · ─ ·✶· ─ · · When everyone is asleep at Buck's house, Maddie and Eddie have a serious conversation.

entry.title: Camp Counselor Head Canons. AKA An Excuse To Talk About My Favorite Place In The World!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
entry.summary:
Author: RENSinnermachinations

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,960Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Ever wonder how your favorite characters would be like if they were summer camp counselors? Come see how I think they would be like.

entry.title: The Now, The Then, The Thinking Of When
entry.summary:
Author: stolen_pen_name23

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,970Chapters: 9/15Kudos: 132

Summary: “Just rest now,” Bobby says. His voice retains the authority of a commanding officer — the tone that Eddie has been drilled to obey since he was seventeen. But behind it is something else. Something with more worry, more anguish. “Wait,” Eddie says. Memories hide behind frosted glass in his mind. Something is missing, something important. His eyes sweep the room, searching every corner for the one person who isn’t there. The question breaks through the frosted glass. “Bobby, where is he?” “Eddie…” Bobby says slowly. “We can talk about it later when you’re feeling better.” “Bobby,” Eddie says, slow and calm despite the panic racing through his veins. “I need to know.” Or: An AU where Doug kidnaps Buck to get to Maddie

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
